definitions: An image or video that has been altered or manipulated to appear to be something it is not, typically to misrepresent someone as doing or saying something that they did not.
The technology used to create such altered images or videos.
examples: The deepfake showed the politician making a controversial statement.
Experts are concerned about the rise of deepfakes in political campaigns.
She was a victim of a deepfake that spread misinformation.
